tif.tagspecs

Enum TagIFD_DNG

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<TagIFD_DNG>
      • tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<TagIFD_DNG>, Taggable

    public enum TagIFD_DNG
extends java.lang.Enum<TagIFD_DNG>
implements Taggable
    Defines Adobe Digital Negative (DNG) tags and raw image calibration extensions used in TIFF-based digital image files.

    This enumeration covers Adobe DNG specifications from DNG 1.1 through DNG 1.7, including raw sensor calibration data, colorimetric transforms, lens correction metadata, depth information, semantic masks, and modern compression-related extensions such as JPEG XL (JXL).

    Although these tags are typically associated with the root IFD, many are also valid within SubIFDs that contain raw image data.

    Since:
    18 June 2026
    Version:
    1.1
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static TagIFD_DNG[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (TagIFD_DNG c : TagIFD_DNG.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static TagIFD_DNG valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • getNumberID

        public int getNumberID()
        Specified by:
        getNumberID in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        the 16-bit numerical Tag ID (e.g., 0x0100 for ImageWidth)

      • getDirectoryType

        public DirectoryIdentifier getDirectoryType()
        Specified by:
        getDirectoryType in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        the IFD where this tag is valid

      • getHint

        public TagHint getHint()
        Specified by:
        getHint in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        the expected data type or format hint for this tag

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
        Specified by:
        getDescription in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        a human-readable name or description of the tag

      • translate

        public java.lang.String translate(java.lang.Object val)
        Converts known DNG enumerated values into human-readable text.
        Specified by:
        translate in interface Taggable
        Parameters:
        val - the tag value
        Returns:
        a human-readable interpretation of the value if applicable, otherwise null

      • translateVersion

        private java.lang.String translateVersion(java.lang.Object val)
